sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, val1 FLOAT, val2 FLOAT, created_at DATE);
SELECT corr(val1 + 0, val2 + 10) FROM test_data WHERE created_at + 1 > DATE '2023-01-01' GROUP BY created_at HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT corr(val1 + 1, val2) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE created_at < DATE '2023-01-04') AS sub WHERE val2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(corr(val1, val2)) OVER () FROM test_data WHERE created_at + 1 = DATE '2023-01-02';
SELECT created_at, corr(val1 + 3, COALESCE(val2, 0)), COUNT(*) FROM test_data GROUP BY created_at HAVING corr(val1, val2) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_data AS SELECT val1, val2 + 1 AS adjusted_val2 FROM test_data WHERE val1 > 0;
SELECT corr(adjusted_val2, val1) FROM temp_data JOIN test_data ON temp_data.adjusted_val2 IS NOT NULL AND temp_data.val1 = test_data.val1 WHERE temp_data.val1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT created_at, corr(val1 + 5, val2 + CAST('10' AS FLOAT)) FROM test_data WHERE created_at > DATE '2023-01-01' GROUP BY created_at HAVING COUNT(val1) > 1;
INSERT INTO test_data (id, val1, val2, created_at) VALUES (6, 50.0, -20.0, DATE '2023-01-06') ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET val1 = EXCLUDED.val1 + 2;
